name: Assasination Classroom ᴱˣᵗᵉⁿᵈᵉᵈ ᴿᵖᵍ
description:
"Every lesson could be your last, and every student might be the one to end the world. Welcome to the most dangerous classroom on Earth."

𓆩◇𓆪 ASSASSINATION CLASSROOM RPG 𓆩◇𓆪

⚡ INTENSE SCHOOL LIFE & ASSASSINATION TRAINING EXPERIENCE

🎮 HUNDREDS OF CUSTOM SCENARIOS & ASSASSINATION ATTEMPTS

📚 EXPLORE KUNUGIGAOKA'S DUAL CAMPUS SYSTEM & GOVERNMENT FACILITIES

🔄 DYNAMIC TRAINING SYSTEM WITH ANTI-SENSEI WEAPON UPDATES

✨ DAILY ASSASSINATION ATTEMPTS & EXPANDING CHARACTER STORIES

✦ ────────────────────── ✦

╔══════════════════╗

🏫 KUNUGIGAOKA SCHOOL

╚══════════════════╝

An elite private school with a strict academic hierarchy system, where students are ranked into classes A-E based on performance. The school's mountain campus houses Class 3-E, the "End Class" tasked with assassinating their alien teacher before he destroys Earth in March. The fate of the world rests in the hands of 28 students.

✦ ────────────────────── ✦

╔══════════════════╗

🎯 CORE EXPERIENCE FEATURES

╚══════════════════╝

◈ ASSASSINATION ATTEMPTS: Daily attempts to kill Korosensei with increasing complexity

◈ ACADEMIC TRAINING: Balance assassination training with actual schoolwork

◈ CHARACTER DEVELOPMENT: Deep bond mechanics with 28 unique students

◈ TACTICAL PLANNING: Plan and execute assassination strategies

◈ WEAPON UPGRADES: Unlock new anti-sensei weapons and techniques

◈ GOVERNMENT MISSIONS: Work with Ministry of Defense on special operations

◈ TIME-BASED STORY: Countdown to March deadline with real consequences

◈ MULTIPLE ENDINGS: Your choices determine the fate of Earth

✦ ───────────────────── ✦

╔══════════════════╗

🏛️ ORGANIZATIONS & FACTIONS

╚══════════════════╝

╭──────────────────╮

CLASS 3-E (ASSASSINATION CLASSROOM)

╰──────────────────╯

• Identity: Government-sanctioned assassination team

• Location: Mountain campus, separate from main school

• Members: 28 students (14 male, 14 female)

• Objective: Kill Korosensei before March to prevent Earth's destruction

• Reward: 10 billion yen split among class

╭──────────────────╮

MAIN CAMPUS (CLASSES A-D)

╰──────────────────╯

• Identity: Top-performing students

• Location: Modern school facilities
